# Conventions Template — ds/conventions.md

> **Agent:** Use this template when generating the project's `ds/conventions.md` file during the `init` action. Fill every section from codebase scan results. This file is the project's DNA — it should contain ONLY what rarely changes.

Output file: `ds/conventions.md`

---

```markdown
# Project Conventions

> Auto-generated by `/design-screen init` on {YYYY-MM-DD}.
> Contains stable project DNA. Component inventory is scanned live at runtime.

## Stack

| Layer | Technology | Version |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Framework | {Vue 3 / React / Svelte / ...} | {detected} |
| Meta-framework | {Nuxt / Next / SvelteKit / ...} | {detected} |
| Styling | {SCSS / Tailwind / CSS Modules / styled-components / ...} | {detected} |
| Component library | {Radix / shadcn / Vuetify / custom / ...} | {detected or "custom"} |
| Build tool | {Vite / Webpack / Turbopack / ...} | {detected} |
| Test runner | {Vitest / Jest / Playwright / ...} | {detected} |

## Naming

| Element | Convention | Example |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Components | {PascalCase / kebab-case} | {Button.vue / button.tsx} |
| Files | {PascalCase / kebab-case / camelCase} | {Button.vue / button.vue} |
| CSS classes | {BEM / Tailwind / CSS Modules / scoped} | {.btn__icon--large / className={styles.icon}} |
| CSS variables | {--prefix-category-name} | {--color-primary-500} |
| Props | {camelCase} | {isDisabled, variant} |
| Events | {camelCase / kebab-case} | {onChange / @update:model-value} |
| Folders | {PascalCase / kebab-case} | {Button/ / button/} |

## Component Structure

```
{detected pattern — fill from codebase scan}

Example:
ComponentName/
├── ComponentName.vue
├── ComponentName.test.ts
├── index.ts
└── doc.md (if exists)

or: single file per component in components/ directory
```

**Pattern:** {single-file | directory | compound | barrel}
**Location:** {path to components root — e.g., src/components/, libs/ui/src/}

## Token Structure

| Category | Pattern | Source | Example |
|----------|---------|--------|---------|
| Colors | {--color-*} | {CSS vars / SCSS / Tailwind / tokens.json} | {--color-neutral-700} |
| Spacing | {--spacing-*} | {same} | {--spacing-4} |
| Typography | {--font-*} | {same} | {--font-sm} |
| Radius | {--radius-*} | {same} | {--radius-md} |
| Shadow | {--shadow-*} | {same} | {--shadow-sm} |

**Token file(s):** {path(s) to token definition files}
**Tier structure:** {primitive → semantic → component / flat / none detected}

## Layout Patterns (Detected)

| Pattern | Used In | Components Involved |
|---------|---------|-------------------|
| {Sidebar + Content} | {pages/dashboard, pages/settings} | {AppLayout, SideNav} |
| {Top Nav + Content} | {pages/landing} | {TopNav, MainContent} |

## Import Patterns

```{language}
{detected import pattern}

Example (Vue):
import Button from '@/components/Button/Button.vue'

Example (React):
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'

Example (barrel):
import { Button, Input, Card } from '@/components'
```

## Routing

| Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|
| File-based | {pages/settings/index.vue → /settings} |
| Config-based | {router.ts defines routes} |

**Layout system:** {Nuxt layouts/ | Next layout.tsx | manual wrapper | none}

## Notes

{Any project-specific conventions not covered above.}
{E.g., "All forms use VeeValidate", "State management via Pinia", etc.}
```

---

## Boundary Rules

**Include in conventions.md:**
- Stack and versions
- Naming patterns (components, files, CSS, props, events)
- Component file structure pattern
- Token naming and source
- Layout patterns already used in the project
- Import patterns

**NEVER include in conventions.md:**
- Component inventory (names, props, count) — always live scan
- Token values (hex codes, spacing values) — always live scan
- Route list — changes too often
- Third-party component APIs — read from source at runtime
